refnamediv.refpurpose: plots residuals from a Markov switching regression

listitem.para: * res = the results typed list of a Markov switching regression

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Plots the residuals from a Markov switching regression.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
refsection.programlisting:
load(GROCERDIR+'\data\us_revu.dat')
bounds('1967m4','2004m2')
nb_states=2 switch_var=2 // variances are switching var_opt=3 // unrestricted var-cov matrix
res=ms_reg('100*(log(us_revu)-lagts(2,log(us_revu)))',['100*(lagts(1,log(us_revu))-lagts(3,log(us_revu)))';... '100*(lagts(2,log(us_revu))-lagts(4,log(us_revu)))';'100*(lagts(3,log(us_revu))-lagts(5,log(us_revu)))'],'cte',nb_states,switch_var,var_opt,'transf=stud',... 'noprint')
pltms_resid(res)
